code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(current)
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(current)
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn emit_pairs(_ xs: List<Int>, _ ys: List<Int>) -> Unit
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      match ys.get(i)
      when Some(y)
        let s = x + y
        print("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    emit_pairs(parse_line(l1), parse_line(l2))
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
